rationale: Multiple Microsoft-signed DISM-related DLLs are being loaded by DismHost.exe from a temporary directory (C:\Windows\Temp\[guid]) (A0, EV-001, EV-002, EV-003, EV-004). While the files are signed by Microsoft, loading system binaries from a temporary directory is unusual and could indicate an attempt to bypass security controls or execute malicious code via DLL side-loading or search order hijacking, even if the loaded DLLs themselves are legitimate.
